title: CC narrative review S03 panel a1

payload.notes: S03 delivers its B03 half-beat well: researcher-only morning lecture, "decoding order?" notebook doodle, phone with both expected literals (ARIS RUNNING / DDL T-19:42) crisp, intended thought line baked, and the lower-right home-desk inset — the same ML RESEARCH mug with its steam fading to one thin wisp — sells the time-passing caption '她回到人间上课。'. The warm lecture hall against the cool blue skyline out the window keeps the two-world contrast alive even in this duo-free panel. Minor deduction: the causal-structure blackboard (X→Z→Y, invariance / intervention / generalization) is dense enough to compete with the small phone card for the first read, so the DDL tension lands on the second pass rather than the first; composition_story=4, narrative_beat_fidelity=4.5.
